Explanation: The book "Opium: How an Ancient Flower Shaped and Poisoned Our World" by Dr. John Halpern and David Blistein (2019) is directly about an addictive substance (opium) made from a flower (the poppy) [911]. This matches the subject and time frame. However, none of the search results provide evidence about the acquisition of the author's collection after 2000 and before 2020, nor about the purchase being funded by two people with the same last name. The only book matching all other criteria is this one, as also concluded by Agents 1, 2, and 3.
Exact Answer: Opium: How an Ancient Flower Shaped and Poisoned Our World
Confidence: 85%
